channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tragedy at World Cup screening in Gaza as Israeli strike kills organizer
item.description: An Israeli strike in Gaza has killed a World Cup screening organizer moments before the event's kickoff, marking a tragic intersection of international sports and ongoing conflict. The incident occurr...

item.title: US and Iran Exchange Escalating Strikes Amid Tensions
item.description: The United States and Iran engaged in a renewed cycle of military strikes following tensions over attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. US President Donald Trump ordered retaliatory strikes agains...

item.title: New Psychiatric Hospital to Boost Mental Healthcare and Create Jobs in Port Shepstone
item.description: A new 28-bed psychiatric hospital, costing R240 million, is set to be built in Port Shepstone, KwaZulu-Natal. The project, spearheaded by the KZN Departments of Health and Public Works, aims to addres...

item.title: Father accused of killing wife and daughters flees to Zimbabwe as police hunt begins
item.description: UK police are actively searching for Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, a 45-year-old British citizen of Zimbabwean heritage, who is suspected of murdering his wife, Zandile Tshuma, 42, and their daughters, Na...

item.title: US removes Syria from terror blacklist, signaling diplomatic shift
item.description: The United States announced on July 8, 2026, that it will delist Syria as a state sponsor of terrorism, marking a significant shift in its foreign policy. This decision, effective in 45 days unless bl...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Insights for July 9, 2026
item.description: The article discusses Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui predictions for July 9, 2026, focusing on the energy and auspiciousness of the day. Published by ABS-CBN Lifestyle, the piece highlights how the align...

item.title: Elaine Chao's Spokesperson Addresses Her Decision to Stay in China During Mitch McConnell's Hospitalization
item.description: Former Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao's spokesperson addressed concerns about Sen. Mitch McConnell's health and her decision to remain in China during his hospitalization. The statement clarifie...

item.title: Dune: Part Three Trailer Reveals Paul's Struggles as Emperor
item.description: The article discusses the release of the trailer for Denis Villeneuve’s third installment of the Dune film trilogy, titled 'Dune: Part Three.' It highlights the narrative focus on Paul Atreides, portr...

item.title: Australian CEOs discuss investment opportunities with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi
item.description: Billionaire data centre operator Robin Khuda has urged Australia's $4.5 trillion superannuation sector to invest in India, citing the country's scale and growth potential as key factors for long-term ...

item.title: Bairnsdale Lakes Entrance weather forecast and access issues
item.description: The article discusses the weather forecast for Bairnsdale Lakes Entrance, providing details on expected conditions. However, the text also includes a message from News Corp Australia regarding crawler...

item.title: A Digital Rendering of Antoni Gaudi's Hypothetical New York Hotel
item.description: This article explores a speculative architectural concept: what if Antoni Gaudi, the renowned Catalan architect famous for the Sagrada Família, had designed a massive hotel in New York City? The piece...

item.title: Student with upper-limb disability achieves top marks in Tanzania exams
item.description: Hamis Nguku, a student with an upper-limb disability who writes and performs daily tasks using his feet, has achieved Division One with five points in Tanzania's 2026 Advanced Certificate of Secondary...

item.title: U.S. Indictments Detail Bishnoi's Global Criminal Network and Surrey Killing
item.description: U.S. prosecutors unsealed three indictments accusing India-based organized crime networks of orchestrating political killings, extortion, and drug trafficking across Canada, the U.S., and Europe. Lawr...

item.title: Former Ekurhuleni Officials Arrested Over Corruption Allegations
item.description: Former Ekurhuleni city manager Imogen Mashazi has been summoned by police to appear in connection with corruption and malfeasance investigations. This follows the arrest of suspended legal head Kemi B...

item.title: The Pitt and Hacks Lead Emmy Nominations in 2026
item.description: The Pitt and Hacks have emerged as the top contenders for Emmy nominations in 2026, marking a significant milestone in the television industry. These two shows, produced by HBO Max, have garnered crit...

item.title: Sokoto State Strengthens Security with New Equipment and Troop Directives
item.description: The Defence Minister, General Christopher Gwabin Musa (Rtd.), commissioned 62 operational vehicles, 320 motorcycles, and high-tech security gear worth ₦27.6 billion to boost security in Sokoto State. ...

item.title: Colombian Fans Rally in Vancouver Ahead of World Cup Match Against Switzerland
item.description: Colombian soccer fans made a dramatic entrance in Vancouver, Canada, ahead of their World Cup Round of 16 match against Switzerland. The enthusiastic supporters gathered outside the team's hotel, crea...

item.title: GOP Megadonor Ken Griffin Backs Marco Rubio Over JD Vance for 2028 Presidential Bid
item.description: Ken Griffin, CEO of Citadel LLC and a major GOP donor, revealed at the Allen & Company conference that he intends to support Secretary of State Marco Rubio over Vice President JD Vance if both run for...

item.title: Insurance Industry Faces Challenges in Responding to Potential Cyberattack Scenarios
item.description: A simulation exercise conducted by CyberAcuView and industry experts highlighted the vulnerabilities of the insurance sector in responding to large-scale cyberattacks. The scenario, based on the poten...

item.title: Ondo State Auditor-General Questions N6.7Billion OSOPADEC Contracts Over Missing Documents
item.description: The Ondo State Auditor-General has raised concerns over the lack of procurement documents for seven contracts worth N6.7 billion awarded by the OSOPADEC agency. Auditors couldn't verify if the contrac...
